title: palicourea debilis
intro: Palicourea debilis, also known as Puna or Puna plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Palicourea debilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
